channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Veteran Sowetan Photographer Veli Nhlapo Retires After 40-Year Career
item.description: Veteran Sowetan photographer Veli Nhlapo, 65, has announced his retirement after a career spanning over 40 years. Colleagues from Arena Holdings hosted a send-off party at their Parktown offices, cele...

item.title: The Bear Season Five Concludes with Restaurant's Success and Character Departures
item.description: The Bear's fifth and final season concludes with the restaurant surviving financial struggles and earning two Michelin stars, marking a bittersweet ending for the characters. After Carmy's decision to...

item.title: Punjab's EPA Introduces Skimming Boat to Combat Plastic Pollution in Lahore Canal
item.description: Punjab's Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) has launched a skimming boat to address plastic waste in the Lahore Canal, marking a technological step against water pollution. The pilot project aims t...

item.title: Supreme Court halts Cytonn property transfers as constitutional issues arise
item.description: The Supreme Court of Kenya has issued conservatory orders to suspend the transfer of high-value properties linked to Cytonn Investments, pending the resolution of a constitutional appeal. The ruling, ...

item.title: Massive surveillance expansion under Trump administration faces growing opposition
item.description: The article details the expanding use of Flock Safety's surveillance cameras by U.S. law enforcement, particularly under the Trump administration, for purposes far beyond traditional law enforcement. ...

item.title: Kenya Opposition Leader Sifuna Calls for Unity to Challenge Ruto's Administration
item.description: Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) Secretary-General Edwin Sifuna has firmly rejected allegations that his movement or Linda Mwananchi could split the opposition vote ahead of the 2027 General Election....

item.title: Supreme Court Dismisses Gynaecologist's Appeal to Restore Hospital Admission Privileges
item.description: Dr Ganes Anil Ramdhin, a Cape Town gynaecologist, sought to reinstate his hospital admission privileges after being suspended by the Health Professions Council of South Africa (HPCSA) for professional...

item.title: Opposition Leader Halts Public Rallies Due to Security Concerns
item.description: Prominent opposition leader Moise Katumbi has temporarily suspended public rallies in the Democratic Republic of Congo, citing escalating political tensions and security risks. The decision comes amid...

item.title: Energy Storage Solutions for Seasonal Demand
item.description: The article discusses the limitations of current battery storage systems for seasonal energy needs, proposing hydrogen-based storage solutions as a viable alternative. It highlights the EU's focus on ...

item.title: Alberta's New Oil Pipeline Faces Significant Challenges in Development
item.description: The article discusses the challenges faced by Alberta's new oil pipeline proposal, highlighting key issues such as environmental regulations, Indigenous consultations, and economic factors. The projec...

item.title: Dis-Chem's Strategic Investments and Expansion in South Africa's Healthcare Market
item.description: Dis-Chem, a leading South African retail and healthcare group, is leveraging strategic investments to strengthen its position in the evolving healthcare and wellness market. Despite persistent consume...

item.title: Kenya's PS Warns Boda Boda Operators Against Political Violence and Criminal Gang Involvement
item.description: Principal Secretary for Internal Security and National Administration Raymond Omollo has issued a stern warning against the use of boda boda operators to perpetrate political violence, emphasizing tha...

item.title: Youth detention centres house children charged with crimes
item.description: The article highlights the operation of New South Wales youth detention centres, which house children as young as 10 years old charged with crimes ranging from shoplifting to murder. Less than four pe...

item.title: The Impact of Independence Day (1996) on Sci-Fi and Blockbuster Films
item.description: The 1996 film *Independence Day* (original title in Spanish: *El día de la independencia*) became a cultural phenomenon, blending disaster-movie tropes with alien invasion themes to redefine summer bl...

item.title: Chel Diokno Disputes Bank Secrecy Claims Against Sara Duterte's Husband
item.description: House Assistant Minority Leader Chel Diokno of Akbayan party-list filed a counter-affidavit disputing Manases Carpio's allegations that he violated bank secrecy, anti-money laundering, and privacy law...

item.title: NSW government invests $12 billion to build new Tangara trains in Hunter Valley, creating thousands of jobs
item.description: The NSW government has announced a $12 billion investment over 15 years to construct a new manufacturing facility in the Hunter Valley for the next generation of Tangara trains. Two potential sites—Gl...

item.title: South African Recipes Inspired by the Springboks Team
item.description: The article highlights Pick n Pay's 'Eat Like a Champion' campaign, which collaborates with Springbok team dietitian Robyn Moore to provide accessible recipes for South African families. Three classic...

item.title: PDP Candidate Accuses State Government of Targeting His University with Tax Audit
item.description: Arthur-Jarvis Archibong, the PDP governorship candidate in Cross River State, accused the state government of using tax authorities to target his privately owned university, Arthur Jarvis University. ...

item.title: Cullie Ruto graduates with Bachelor’s degree in Interior Architecture from Heriot-Watt University Dubai
item.description: Cullie Chepng'etich Ruto, the daughter of Kenyan President William Ruto and First Lady Rachel Ruto, has successfully graduated from Heriot-Watt University’s Dubai campus with a Bachelor of Arts in Int...

item.title: Quadcopter crash reported in Islamabad's Humak locality
item.description: A quadcopter, flown from an unidentified location, crash-landed on the rooftop of a residential house in Islamabad's Humak locality. The incident occurred in Model Town, where a resident alerted the p...
